{{Quote|Wow! That means your uncle Dro is related to my aunt Coolie...|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Children of the Jedi (novel)" />}}
'''Coolie''' was an aunt of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. When [[Callista Ming]] told Luke about her uncle [[Dro]]'s opposition to anyone having fun, the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] laughingly remarked that Dro must have been related to Coolie.<ref name="Children of the Jedi (novel)" />
